title: Before The Snow
content:
Autumn is gone: through the blue woodlands bare
    Shatters the rainy wind. A myriad leaves,
    Like birds that fly the mournful Northern air.

title: Blackmouth, Of Colorado
content:
"Who is Blackmouth?" Well, that's hard to say.
    Mebbe he might ha' told you, 't other day,
    If you'd been here. Now, - he's gone away.

title: Helen At The Loom
content:
Helen, in her silent room,

    Purpled over, deep. But mark

title: The Bather.

content:

title: The Singing Wire
content:
Ethereal, faint that music rang,
    As, with the bosom of the breeze,
    It rose and fell and murmuring sang
        Aeolian harmonies!

title: O Wholesome Death
content:

title: The Lover's Year
content:

content:

title: Bluebird's Greeting

title: Melancholy.

title: The Fisher Of The Cape.
content:
At morn his bark like a bird
    Slips lightly oceanward - 
    Sail feathering smooth o'er the bay
    And beak that drinks the wild spray.

title: The Ghosts Of Growth.
content:

title: Bride Brook

title: Three Doves
At The Golden Gate
content:

title: Night In New York
content:

    Strangely you murmur below me,
    Strange is your half-silent power.

title: The Voice Of The Void
content:
I warn, like the one drop of rain
    On your face, ere the storm;
    Or tremble in whispered refrain
    With your blood, beating warm.

title: June Longings.
